articles.title: 18,000 flats in 12 neighbourhoods to be upgraded under Home Improvement Programme
articles.summary:
📰 싱가포르, 정부, 취업 관련 뉴스
📢 18,000 flats in 12 neighbourhoods to be upgraded under Home Improvement Programm...
articles.content: SINGAPORE - Around 18,000 flats across Singapore have been selected for home upgrading works under the Housing Board’s Home Improvement Programme (HIP). The Government has allocated $253 million for the works, said the HDB. The Government has spent about $5 billion on these works, she added.
